nasb.text: So the young men who were spies went in and brought out Rahab and her father and her mother and her brothers and all she had; they also brought out all her relatives and placed them outside the camp of Israel.

esv.text: So the young men who had been spies went in and brought out Rahab and her father and mother and brothers and all who belonged to her. And they brought all her relatives and put them outside the camp of Israel.

cnv.text: 那兩個年輕密探就進去，把喇合和她的父母、兄弟、她所有的一切，以及她所有的親屬，都領出來，安置在以色列的營外。

ccb.text: 于是，那两个年轻探子便进去，把喇合和她的父母、兄弟及所有的亲人都带出来，安置在以色列人的营外。
